metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the nutrition domain.

children.name: Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model
children.description: Ingredients, nutrients, digestibility/energy systems, UoM conversions, derived values, metadata.

children.name: Constraints, Rules & Business Logic
children.description: Min/max bounds, ratios, additive rules, ingredient bans, customer constraints, plant constraints.

children.name: Least-Cost Optimization Solver
children.description: Optimization engine with objectives (cost, margin, sustainability), multiple constraints, penalties.

children.name: Recipe Lifecycle & Governance
children.description: Versioning, approvals, effective dates, audit trail, change rationale, role-based permissions.

children.name: Spec Management (Product & Material)
children.description: Material specs, finished product specs, tolerances, test requirements, customer spec variants.

children.name: Reformulation & Scenario Simulation
children.description: What-if comparisons, ingredient substitution, price sensitivity, constraint stress tests.

children.name: Procure-to-Pay
children.description: Requisitions, purchase orders, receipts, invoice matching, approvals and vendor management.

children.name: Order-to-Cash
children.description: Quotes, sales orders, pricing, allocations, delivery, invoicing and credit workflows.

children.name: Inventory, Warehousing & Silos
children.description: Lot/batch inventory, locations, silo management, transfers, shrinkage, stock policies.

children.name: Costing & Margin Accounting
children.description: Standard/actual costing, cost rollups, variance analysis, margin reporting, by-product handling.

children.name: Finance & Controls
children.description: GL/AP/AR, tax, audit controls, period close, multi-entity consolidation support (as needed).

children.name: Pricing & Contract Management
children.description: Customer price lists, formulas, rebates; supplier contracts; link to market indices.

children.name: Demand Planning & Forecasting
children.description: Forecast generation, seasonality, promotions, forecast error tracking and scenario planning.

children.name: Material Requirements Planning (MRP)
children.description: Net requirements, safety stock, lead times, reorder policies, planned orders.

children.name: Capacity Planning
children.description: Rough-cut and detailed capacity checks, constraints by line, shift calendars, bottlenecks.

children.name: Production Scheduling
children.description: Sequence optimization, campaign planning, changeover constraints, due-date adherence.

children.name: Supply Risk & What-if Scenarios
children.description: Material shortages, substitutions, alternate sourcing, service level impacts.

children.name: Batching & Dosing Instructions
children.description: Generate execution instructions from approved recipes; enforce tolerances and sequencing.

children.name: Shop-floor Data Capture
children.description: Capture actual weights/consumption, cycle times, downtime reasons and operator inputs.

children.name: Yield, Loss & Reconciliation
children.description: Track yields, losses, rework; reconcile back to inventory and costing.

children.name: Deviations & Exceptions Management
children.description: Detect and record deviations from target recipe/plan; route to quality and approvals.

children.name: Batch Genealogy & Traceability Links
children.description: Maintain batch-to-lot genealogy; connect materials to finished goods for recall readiness.

children.name: Sampling Plans & Test Requirements
children.description: Define sampling frequency, methods, tests per material/product/customer and risk level.

children.name: Lab Instrument & External Lab Integration
children.description: Automated intake of test results from instruments/LIS and external labs, with validation.

children.name: Results Management & SPC
children.description: Result capture, limits, trend analysis, statistical process control, alerts.

children.name: Hold/Release & Disposition
children.description: Workflow for holds, re-tests, release decisions, quarantines, and rework instructions.

children.name: Nonconformities & CAPA
children.description: Deviations, complaints linkage, root cause analysis, corrective/preventive actions.

children.name: COA & Quality Documentation
children.description: Certificate of Analysis generation, attachments, customer templates and controlled distribution.

children.name: Label Composition & Declarations
children.description: Generate ingredient declarations, nutritional panels (as applicable), additives, and required statements.

children.name: Claims & Rules Validation
children.description: Validate label claims against formulation, tolerances, legal thresholds and customer promises.

children.name: Market/Export Compliance Packs
children.description: Country/market specific requirements, language variants, document bundles for shipments.

children.name: Audit Trail & Evidence Management
children.description: Traceable record of spec/label changes, approvals, linked lab evidence, and distribution logs.

children.name: Customer Order Self-Service
children.description: Create, modify, track orders; delivery dates; backorder visibility; notifications.

children.name: Document & Certificate Center
children.description: Access/download COAs, specs, labels, invoices, delivery notes; customer-specific document views.

children.name: Customer-Specific Product Catalog & Specs
children.description: Customer-specific assortment, pricing, pack formats, spec agreements and controlled visibility.

children.name: Service & Case Management (Lite)
children.description: Requests, complaints, returns; triage and handoff to quality workflows.

children.name: Supplier Onboarding & Qualification
children.description: Qualification steps, approvals, required documents, approved material lists, risk level.

children.name: Spec Exchange & Change Notifications
children.description: Structured spec uploads, versioning, change alerts and approvals.

children.name: Supplier Documents (SDS/COA) Intake
children.description: Collect SDS/COA, validate completeness, route to QC/compliance, maintain traceable history.

children.name: Supplier Performance & Scorecards
children.description: OTIF, defect rates, nonconformities, responsiveness and trend views.

children.name: Unified KPI Dashboards
children.description: Role-based dashboards for exec, nutrition, QA, procurement and operations.

children.name: Cost & Margin Drivers Analytics
children.description: Material cost impact, formulation cost deltas, yield variances, customer profitability.

children.name: Quality Analytics & Trend Detection
children.description: Spec drift, supplier defect trends, SPC alerts, complaint correlations.

children.name: Forecast & Service Level Analytics
children.description: Forecast error, fill rate, OTIF, schedule adherence and root-cause analysis.

children.name: Scenario Engine (What-if Workspace)
children.description: Compare scenarios across price, supply, specs and capacity; store and share assumptions.

children.name: AI Models & Decision Support
children.description: Recommendations (substitutions, risk flags), anomaly detection, predictive quality or yield.

children.name: API Gateway & Service Interfaces
children.description: REST/GraphQL endpoints, auth, throttling, versioning, developer access controls.

children.name: Event Streaming & Messaging
children.description: Publish/subscribe for changes (prices, specs, batches, lab results), async workflows.

children.name: EDI & Partner Connectivity
children.description: Orders, ASNs, invoices, shipment status; standardized mappings and monitoring.

children.name: Connectors (MES/SCADA/Lab/Market Feeds)
children.description: Prebuilt adapters for plant systems, lab systems, commodity/price feeds and sensors.

children.name: Integration Monitoring & Replay
children.description: Health checks, dead-letter handling, retries, reconciliation reports and replay tooling.

children.name: Reference Data & Units Management
children.description: Units of measure, conversions, calendars, codesets, naming standards, multilingual labels.

children.name: Entity Lifecycle & Stewardship
children.description: Create/approve/change workflows for ingredients, suppliers, customers, specs, sites.

children.name: Data Quality Rules & Validation
children.description: Completeness checks, duplicate detection, validation rules and exception queues.

children.name: Master Data Synchronization
children.description: Sync master data to/from ERP, MES, LIMS, portals via APIs/events with mapping.

children.name: Identity, SSO & MFA
children.description: SAML/OIDC, SSO, MFA, password policies and identity lifecycle.

children.name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
children.description: Fine-grained permissions by site/product/customer; least privilege and role templates.

children.name: Segregation of Duties (SoD) & Approvals
children.description: Enforce SoD, approval chains for recipes, purchases, releases, and compliance changes.

children.name: Audit Logging & Compliance Reporting
children.description: Immutable logs, access reports, change histories, evidence exports for audits.

children.name: Data Governance Policies
children.description: Retention, classification, access reviews, privacy controls and governance workflows.

children.name: Deployment Models (Cloud/On-Prem/Hybrid)
children.description: Standardized packaging and provisioning across deployment types and multi-site setups.

children.name: CI/CD & Release Management
children.description: Pipelines, versioning, feature flags, rollback strategies and change management.

children.name: Observability (Logs/Metrics/Tracing)
children.description: Centralized monitoring, alerting, SLOs, performance monitoring and root-cause tooling.

children.name: Backup, Disaster Recovery & HA
children.description: Backups, restore testing, RPO/RTO targets, high availability patterns.

children.name: Data Platform Foundations
children.description: Operational data stores, analytics warehouse/lake hooks, retention and data pipelines.
